title: Copy-to-clipboard selected values from a column?
excerpt:

posts.author: ajwhitman (AJ W)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to copy to clipboard several values from a single column for selected pulses?

My use case: Sometimes I want to email a handful of people, and it would be nice to be able to find them in Monday (listed as pulses), select the people I want to email, and copy the values from the email column to paste into the “to” field in my email (or wherever else, like another spreadsheet). It would also be nice to be able to do this without having to go through exporting to Excel, copying, deleting the otherwise-useless spreadsheet, etc, because at that point it’s easier to just copy each of the 4-5 email addresses individually.

posts.author: Wheelhouse_kw (Kairo Weber)
posts.cookedHtml: Did you ever figure out if this is possible? It seems like such a basic function that Monday.com is lacking.

posts.author: AnishJ (Anish)
posts.cookedHtml:
Really Is this is not possible? I want to copy all my emails to my computer but seems like I cant’ do that right?

I just want to copy the all the emails here

posts.author: vmccoy (V)
posts.cookedHtml: While I appreciate your efforts and applaud your problem solving, this would result in requiring a paid app, which my organization is unwilling to add. I’m sure you will agree… selecting multiple rows of data and being able to copy and paste is basic and should be included. Also, the additional step of exporting to Excel isn’t ideal each time. Even just allowing the email columns to do this would be a step up.

posts.author: josh.demoss (Joshua DeMoss)
posts.cookedHtml: I just want to copy selected task names to my clipboard and it doesn’t let me
